raw_consumer_statement:
It was brought to my attention the charges from XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ) and XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) have been charged back to my account after your internal investigation. I have provided evidence that I was in fact home those two days and was NOT in XXXX, Georgia. Evidence includes XXXX XXXX camera still shots ( of me and my wife ), dated and timestamped, my stay history with XXXX and XXXX, text messages from XXXX who was onsite purchasing a vehicle from my family, and emails showing I was working with a contractor in my town regarding fieldwork. 

Finally, I personally called both hotels who verified the card was NOT physically used at the locations. 


Charges include the following : XX/XX/2023 {$190.00} @ XXXX XXXX  XXXX GA XX/XX/2023 {$190.00} @ XXXX XXXX  XXXX GA XX/XX/2023 {$320.00} @ XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX GA XX/XX/2023 {$220.00} @ XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX GA
